task_description: Premium UI/UX Overhaul & Advanced Music Discovery Enhancements - Transform the music search app into a premium editorial music experience with frosted glass design system, dynamic color extraction, ambient backgrounds, enhanced player, smart recommendations, lyrics, micro-interactions, custom cursor, and settings panel.

verification.summary: Build succeeds with zero TypeScript errors. Lint passes with zero errors (2 pre-existing warnings in SearchFilters.tsx unrelated to our changes). No test suite configured in this project. All 5 features implemented successfully.
